name: DATUM
compose:
name: slashnode-datum
services:
  datum:
    image: ghcr.io/retropex/datum:v1.14
    container_name: datum
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - '--config=/app/conf/datum_gateway_config.json'
    entrypoint:
      - /app/datum_gateway
    volumes:
      - datum_data-settings:/app/conf/
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:21000:21000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  datum_data-settings:
    name: slashnode-datum_datum_data-settings
